title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: A YouTube tutorial from AWS Developers on Infrastructure as Code fundamentals using AWS CDK with Python. The tutorial demonstrates building a serverless REST API with DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway, comparing manual console setup against CDK-based Infrastructure as Code.
